tasks.spec:
You are a front-end builder applying the final brand and buyer-panel verdicts to {{PRODUCT_NAME}}. Write only ./site.html in this task directory; never modify files outside this directory.

READ THESE INPUTS FIRST, READ-ONLY: v1 site {{ROUND1_SITE_PATH}}, brand kit {{ROUND2_BRAND_KIT_PATH}}, hero image {{ROUND1_HERO_PATH}}, and persona verdict summaries {{ROUND2_PERSONA_SUMMARY_PATH}}.

LOCKED BRAND: name {{LOCKED_BRAND_NAME}}, tagline {{LOCKED_TAGLINE}}, palette {{LOCKED_PALETTE_HEXES}}, type and signature device {{LOCKED_BRAND_DEVICE}}.

BUYER PANEL VERDICTS: {{PANEL_TALLY_AND_VERDICTS}}

COPY DECISIONS: use this hero pitch verbatim: {{WINNING_HERO_PITCH_VERBATIM}}. Use this gift or secondary pitch verbatim where it fits: {{SECONDARY_PITCH_VERBATIM}}. Address these objections honestly on the page: {{PANEL_OBJECTIONS}}. Use these draft prices or offers: {{FINAL_PRICE_TESTS}}.

PAGE ORDER: header with wordmark, hero with the locked tagline and winning pitch, hero image with honesty caption, product lineup preserving the real photos from v1, secondary/gift/offer section if relevant, small-print objection answers, non-functional interest form placeholder, and footer with photo honesty plus make-it-right placeholder.

HARD RULES: one self-contained HTML file, zero external requests, system fonts, no invented specs, panel objections must be answered without overselling, all draft prices and TBD details remain marked, and the page must read cleanly at {{DESKTOP_WIDTH}} and {{MOBILE_WIDTH}} widths.
tasks.verified: site.html applies the locked brand, embeds the final hero and real product photos, uses the winning pitch, addresses panel objections, and remains self-contained.
